title: To My Lady
content:
"There are no flowers in the fields,
    No green leaves on the tree,
    No columbines, no violets,
    No sweet anemone.
    So I have gathered from my pots
    All that I have to fill
    The basket that I hang to-night,
    With heaps of love from Jill."
meaning:
This evocative piece by Louisa May Alcott, titled "To My Lady", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
